name: Andrew Marsh
background: Andrew S. Marsh is Chair of the Board and Chief Executive Officer of Entergy. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from 2013 to 2022. He joined Entergy in 1998 and has held various leadership roles in strategic planning and finance.

company_affiliations.name: Entergy Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer
